description: You are a project engineer reviewing grading plans for the State Route 99 realignment project. Using the cross-sectional area data in ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/sr99_cross_sections.csv and the formulas in ~/Documents/earthwork_formulas.txt, calculate the distance between consecutive stations, Cut Volume, Fill Volume, Adjusted Fill Volume, Net Volume, and Cumulative Mass Haul for each interval using the Average End Area method. Save the finalized earthwork calculation workbook to ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/sr99_mass_haul.xlsx.

metadata.data_source: State Route 99 Realignment Project (Synthetic Survey Data)
